text.title: Error-Tracker to Draft-PR Pipeline Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable preconditions to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: skip — no test = no regression protection

example.trace: structured=true (Sentry Seer) → tests=true → events=120, fixability=0.83 → draft-pr-not-direct-merge → draft PR + regression test

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
